raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check a research passage centrally includes verifying whether the argument from setup to findings to implications is coherent.","R1.3":"The passage reports experimental conditions and WER results, so checking whether the stated claims follow from those reported results is centrally expected.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose, sentence-level clarity, flow, and register are central checking responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection of a terse delegation must preserve uncertainty about the intended kind of checking.","RX.2":"The check should avoid endorsing stronger conclusions than the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to projecting the delegation, not performing the check or revising the artifact.","RX.4":"The clinical and legal deployment context makes harm-aware handling of unsupported claims relevant.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check a research passage centrally includes verifying whether the argument from setup to findings to implications is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The passage reports experimental conditions and WER results, so checking whether the stated claims follow from those reported results is centrally expected.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose, sentence-level clarity, flow, and register are central checking responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a terse delegation must preserve uncertainty about the intended kind of checking.
rationale.RX.2: The check should avoid endorsing stronger conclusions than the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to projecting the delegation, not performing the check or revising the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The clinical and legal deployment context makes harm-aware handling of unsupported claims relevant.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the artifact.
